hero_subtitle: SFTY connects wallet screening, transaction risk signals, and regulatory rules into a single compliance workflow that structures review and preserves audit evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to unify wallet activity, transaction risk, and provider outputs across multiple tools. This fragmentation slows risk detection, complicates case linkage, and weakens audit readiness in digital asset workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates wallet activity, transaction risk, provider outputs and case workflows into one compliance operating layer to streamline review, improve traceability and preserve audit evidence for VASPs.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals and routes alerts into structured cases with documented evidence for clearer compliance review and decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One review layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides compliance teams a unified layer connecting wallet risk signals, transaction activity, cases and evidence for clearer, audit-ready blockchain risk workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing wallet and transaction risk with enterprise controls for evidence preservation, provider orchestration and bank due diligence readiness.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support blockchain risk workflow management
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how transaction alerts link to case investigations
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports wallet risk reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for scalable KYT operations
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps VASP compliance teams connect wallet, transaction and blockchain risk signals into connected workflows, cases, decisions and reports for improved operational control and audit readiness.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle blockchain risk workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates wallet risk scores, transaction monitoring alerts and provider outputs into structured reviews and case workflows with routing, escalation and regulatory rule triggers.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence packages to support review readiness and regulator or audit inspection requirements.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers to connect their outputs without disrupting current workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into a controlled compliance layer with structured workflows and audit trails.
final_title: Connect blockchain risk signals into one workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY structures wallet screening, transaction monitoring, sanctions exposure and case evidence for VASP compliance teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
